name: Peaches Italian Style
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel the peaches.
2. Slice them into medium-sized pieces.
3. Place the sliced peaches in a bowl and sprinkle with sugar.
4. Add the lemon juice, orange juice, port wine, and white wine to the bowl.
5. Mix well without bruising the peaches.
6. Refrigerate for at least 1 hour.
7. Serve chilled in glass cups.
